title: Smoked Resin Tagliatelle
description: A cozy Dutch dish featuring plant-based tagliatelle with a resinous and cheese-pull flavor profile, perfect for a relaxing evening meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped fresh herbs (thyme, rosemary)

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Add pasta and cook until al dente, about 8 minutes.
While the pasta cooks, mix pine nuts with herbs, smoked paprika, garlic, and a pinch of salt in a bowl.
Add cheese into the boiling pasta water when it starts to thicken (around 10-12 mins from start).
Drain the pasta, reserving some cooking liquid. Toss with prepared pine nut mix until well combined.
Serve hot with extra smoked paprika and herbs for garnish.
